/** * Filtering category paths in {@link CategoryParentsStream}, where a given * category is added to the stream, and than all its parents are being * added one after the other by successively removing the last component.
* That loop should have a stop point - the default approach (excluding the * ROOT) is implemented in {@link DefaultOrdinalPolicy}. * * @lucene.experimental */
javadoc_after:
/**
 * Determines which {@link CategoryPath categories} should be added as terms to
 * the {@link CategoryParentsStream}. The default approach is implemented by
 * {@link #ALL_CATEGORIES}.
 * 
 * @lucene.experimental
 */
